h2d3d16c1gc46cg417agac89g7b5ef0463a33: If any of your stuff goes missing, just let me know. You're family now.
h83dfc83fg5259g4c65gad50gc4e217d60ca7: Somebody stole the idol. If I find out who it was... I'll recruit 'em.
hcdfa1fc6g718bg4e66ga03bg4b3afb1ac8b8: Go on, enjoy yourself. But if any of them sleep past noon they're getting left behind.
hff501c6fg4dd8g4e2egbd04g2e868e47f5ea: Here you go. This idol's all yours.
hc7f3aaeegc722g4c8agad54gaf80bef33fc2: Thanks. See you in Baldur's Gate, I hope. Now scram, before I get emotional.
hd35d76e9gb99ag4f13ga2e2ga826ae0813b6: That idol of yours went missing, sorry to say.
hbea31a67gcf90g43a7gbfd0g21962a28b7f7: Damn it. Having that stashed away would have made life a lot easier.
hfe112dd0g1424g46c2gb540gd7bd65e94f9d: I didn't touch the idol. Don't know what happened to it.
h9bbfd9f0gcfbag4e62gacd8g3087fe7d8908: You're a terrible liar. We had a deal.
hecb44d37g3fbfg4f4bg9b0eg17e2e416ed25: And now the deal's off. Maybe this will teach you something.
h84cc9540g2a8bg4227g9093g668d77d078e7: Fine. Hope the damn thing's cursed.
h55fd6ed2g7522g4249ga6a7gd307b1cb52d4: Here's some free advice: never bargain, just take what's yours.
h63a6bd0ag3fa5g413ag9b74g77079dc525fe: Sounds more like a challenge than advice. Keep an eye on your pack.
h081ad769g010fg490bgaf83g347e4ee1a7b2: This party's boring. Should've put me in charge - now, that'd be a real party.
h8b3344c6g351cg4889gaac4gc08e87491a7d: You came through for us. That's a change from most adults I know.
ha568c852g35f9g44c6ga731g0dcde66ff115: Don't be so harsh on your elders.
h8352ae81gee4fg462fg923fge12b8661661e: I'm not. I'm glad they can celebrate before we've even got to the Gate.
h64be428eg3d00g4737ga5d4gf6a4dc65d9f4: Just like I'll be glad to be rid of them once we're there.
h2cc68e81g187eg437bg9877gf56f625ae2a6: Indeed - and now you owe me.
h0e88e80dg5987g40bcga6afg25e858283790: But if you mind your manners, maybe I'll remember you when I'm running the Gate.
ha450e572g9fb1g494fgb4caga2248e3f786c: That sounded dangerously close to a compliment.
h70298634gfa68g41a0ga231g77e2834cd73f: And that sounds like the wine drowning your wits.
h3133f484g04aag4733gadf1g205101c0677c: Go on, enjoy yourself. I've squirreled away a few extra bottles.
h390a5ddbgc86ag4079ga103g0f7bc2c35fe2: What are you doing way over here?
h20fbb797g2c3cg4cfbgb2efg06633645d3a5: Watching a bunch of old folks get dumber by the dram-full. And when they run dry...
h81ad845dgfa54g4e77g8834gf33d2da7ede5: I've got a few bottles tucked away to keep things flowing. For a price, of course.
h94e1c042g1b90g4d25g84e0ga6beec1084c2: Hey, you. Can you keep a secret?
h582bda1fg855cg4989gb70eg72aae2b0caaf: Of course. My lips are easily sealed.
hb26a2b87g4c37g485cg8a38gc7d98a7d62f9: Just between you and me - I nicked some wine.
h712c21a1g7ad7g4109g9eeeg2b0679142b46: When the barrel's tapped out, I'll be there to save the night. For a price, of course.
h523ba6cdg1048g4800g9adbg1169a4dacdf9: Never been a specialty of mine, no.
